---
layout: cv
title: Zachary Hunter's CV
---
# Zachary Hunter
Student at BYUI.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mojozach32@gmail.com">mojozach32@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


Zachary Hunter
mojozach32@gmail.com â€˘ 716-335-8365 â€˘ linkedin.com/in/zachary-hunter-526894329
EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Brigham Young University - Idaho
ď‚· Sophomore Standing
ď‚· Relevant Coursework
ď‚· Programming Fundamentals
ď‚· Data Structures (planned/in progress)
ď‚· Computer Systems
September 2025 - April 2028
Rexburg, ID
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Engineering / Technical Intern
Astronics
April 2022 - May 2022
Buffalo, NY
ď‚· Undertook an Internship for CADD experience with knowledge and experience from Ormsby 
CADD education
ď‚· Assisted engineers with technical and documentation tasks development of invention to make 
manufacturing team work more efficient
ď‚· Supported project teams with software and system-related work
ď‚· Gained exposure to real-world engineering workflows and project development environments
Ormsby Education Center
Ormsby
September 2020 - June 2022
Buffalo, NY
ď‚· Created and modified technical drawings using AutoCAD
ď‚· Assisted with drafting and design adjustments for engineering projects
ď‚· Maintained organized design documentation and revisions
MET worker/ full time
Home Depot
ď‚· Trained with a team
ď‚· Learned socializing skills
ď‚· Helped team with tasks and work loads
Lot worker
June 2021 - September 2021
Orchard Park,NY
June 2022 - September 2022
Home Depot
ď‚· Learned how the company is run by workers with customers
ď‚· Strengthened workers
Orchard Park, NY
OBJECTIVE
Motivated Computer Science student at Brigham Young University seeking an internship or entry-level 
role where I apply programming, CAD design, and problem-solving skills to real-world technical 
challenges
PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES
ď‚· Python
ď‚· C#
ď‚· HTML
ď‚· Technical Tools
ď‚· AutoCAD / CAD Design
ď‚· Basic Cybersecurity Concepts
OTHER SKILLS
Problem Solving
Team Collaboration
Technical Communication
LEADERSHIP & SERVICE
Church Leadership Service
Boy Scouts of America
ď‚· Achieved Eagle Scout
ď‚· Planned and executed a community service project requiring leadership, logistics, and team 
coordination
ď‚· Developed strong leadership, perseverance, and service values
ď‚· Held multiple leadership positions in church callings
ď‚· Organized group activities and service projects
ď‚· Mentored and supported members of youth and community groups
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
ď‚· Originally from Buffalo
ď‚· Interested in software development, cybersecurity, and engineering technology
ď‚· Strong work ethic with proven leadership and teamwork experienc



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
